name: Your Name
title: Software Engineer
summary: Software engineer with experience building reliable, user-focused products. Strong in backend systems, modern web development, and cross-functional collaboration. Interested in solving meaningful problems with simple, maintainable software.

education.details: Relevant coursework, honors, or a concise academic highlight.

bullets: Built and shipped a customer-facing feature that improved a measurable product or business outcome.
Designed maintainable services and collaborated with product, design, and engineering stakeholders.
Automated a recurring workflow and reduced manual effort for the team.
Added tests and documentation for a production system used by internal customers.

projects.name: Project Name
bullets: Created a concise description focused on the problem, your contribution, and the result.
Built with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.

additional.name: Open-source project or community
additional.description: Describe your contribution in one line.
